name: Candy Counter and Display Cases
description: The glass-topped candy and novelty display cases running parallel to the lunch counter across the aisle — the reflection surface Joseph McNeil is using to monitor the crowd, and the position from which Caldwell has been observing since 4:15 PM.
atmosphericDetails: The glass case surface reflecting the lunch counter in a slightly curved, fish-eye distortion — every movement at the stools visible from here without turning
The smell of chocolate and wax paper from the candy display
Caldwell's notepad open on the glass case surface, his handwriting small and tight
